apps.name: Nuvio

apps.localizedDescription: Nuvio Mobile for iOS. Choose AppStore or Full variant from version history.

versions.localizedDescription:
This release is based on Nuvio hotfix update v0.2.3 with added unsubmitted test-features, such as:
- feat: relocated Trakt into Integrations Setting
- feat: LiveTV integrations
- feat: change "Play" to "Watch Again" button for watched movies
- feat: implementation of Picture-in-Picture in iOS
-

This release is based on Nuvio major update v0.2.1 with added unmerged PR and features on the official release, such as:
- ~scrollable language selection~ (merged)
- relocated Trakt into Integrations Setting
- LiveTV integrations
- ~animated GIF avatar support for iOS~ (merged)
- change "Play"

- animated GIF avatar support for iOS
- change "Play" to "Watch Again" butto

This release is based on Nuvio v0.1.25 with added unmerged PR and features on the official release, such as:
- updated Indonesian localization
- scrollable language selection

- LiveTV integrations
